pipelines.description: not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'core', 'analytics', 'core_analytics')))) — module check variant 0.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'core', 'reporting', 'core_reporting')))) — module check variant 1.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'data', 'ingestion', 'data_ingestion')))) — module check variant 2.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'data', 'transform', 'data_transform')))) — module check variant 3.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'ml', 'training', 'ml_training')))) — module check variant 4.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'ml', 'inference', 'ml_inference')))) — module check variant 5.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'export', 'batch', 'export_batch')))) — module check variant 6.
not(empty(intersection(param, createArray('all', 'export', 'stream', 'export_stream')))) — module check variant 7.
empty(intersection(param, param)) — role-based access control with intersection.
string(union(json(param), json(variables(...)))) — config merging with union + json.
json(param) for deserialization + property access and ForEach iteration.
convertFromUtc(utcnow(), timezone, format) — timezone conversion with multiple formats.
coalesce(param, formatDateTime(utcnow(), format)) — date parameter with utcnow fallback.
utcnow('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff') and formatDateTime(utcnow(), ...) for timestamp partitioning.
sub(param, N) — numeric parameter subtraction with type coercion.
length(variables('array')) + equals for retry count tracking in Until loop.
addDays + formatDateTime + mul for computed date range filtering.
union + intersection + empty + json + createArray combined in one pipeline.
coalesce + convertFromUtc + formatDateTime combined for watermark management.
add + sub + mul + div + mod on parameters for batch size calculation.
